title: Texas election results live updates for key races
shortDescription: Follow live updates for Texas election results, including the U.S. Senate GOP race between John Cornyn and Ken Paxton.

title: South Carolina Senate blocks redistricting push
shortDescription: South Carolina Senate votes to pause redistricting as early voting begins despite pressure from President Donald Trump.

title: John Cornyn vs Ken Paxton election results for Texas Senate race
shortDescription: Texas Republicans are voting in a closely watched US Senate primary between John Cornyn and Ken Paxton. See live results here.

title: Trump administration proposes governmentwide NDA amid leaks
shortDescription: The proposal follows a series of high-profile leaks in various federal agencies that officials have described as national security risks.

title: Trump ups refugee cap by 10,000, but only for White South Africans
shortDescription: President Donald Trump shut down refugee admissions after taking office. He raised the cap by 10,000 this year, but only for White South Africans.

title: South Carolina Senate punts on redistricting, bucking Trump
shortDescription: The Republican-controlled South Carolina Senate rejected an effort to draw new congressional districts, bucking President Donald Trump.

title: Trump says his physical exam 'checked out PERFECTLY'
shortDescription: Trump's physical exam, the fourth one of his second term, came amid months of scrutiny around visible bruises, skin discoloration and swollen ankles.

title: Did Donald Trump Jr. get married? What we know
shortDescription: President Donald Trump's eldest son Don Jr. recently married Bettina Anderson. Their wedding was reportedly over the weekend on a tropical island.

title: Trump cancels plan to hold Cabinet meeting at Camp David
shortDescription: President Trump canceled plans to convene his entire Cabinet at Camp David on Wednesday, May 27, citing poor weather that would complicate the visit.

title: Workers construct UFC fight venue on White House grounds
shortDescription: Construction crews build a temporary arena on the White House South Lawn to host the UFC Freedom 250 fight card set for June in Washington, D.C.

title: Trump undergoes routine health check
shortDescription: President Trump undergoes a routine medical exam at Walter Reed ahead of his 80th birthday.

title: Catch up on Trump news from Memorial Day weekend with Trump Connect
shortDescription: On Memorial Day weekend, shots were fired near the White House, President Donald Trump said a deal with Iran was near and Don Jr. got married.

title: Water quality, cancer concerns spill into Iowa's GOP governor primary
shortDescription: Climbing cancer rates, renewed water quality concerns and an ascendant MAHA movement have collided on the gubernatorial campaign trail in Iowa.

title: UFC arena soars above White House as Trump prepares for cage fight
shortDescription: The centerpiece of a temporary UFC arena at the White House now soars above the White House ahead of President Trump's June 14 UFC event.

title: Trump to hold Cabinet meeting as new attacks on Iran threaten ceasefire
shortDescription: The U.S. military launched new strikes on Iran on Monday, threatening to shatter a 7-week ceasefire and derailing peace negotiations in Qatar.

title: Iowa Dems pitch new caucus plan to DNC to regain first-in-nation status
shortDescription: Iowa is one of a dozen states competing for early calendar spots, and Democrats will emphasize Iowa's role in winning back rural voters.

title: See glimpses of Donald Trump Jr., Bettina Anderson's wedding weekend
shortDescription: Donald Trump Jr. and Bettina Anderson were legally married in Florida before holding a ceremony over Memorial Day weekend.

title: Texas election live updates: Paxton vs. Cornyn and other key races
shortDescription: Texas voters are casting ballots across the state as the closely watched Cornyn vs. Paxton Republican Senate runoff and other key races unfold.

title: Daily Briefing: A Texas election to watch
shortDescription: A Republican Senate runoff highlights a month packed with elections. Here is the news to know on Tuesday.

title: Texas Republicans decide the Cornyn-Paxton Senate runoff today
shortDescription: Texas Republicans head to the polls today to pick between Sen. John Cornyn and AG Ken Paxton in the bitter U.S. Senate primary runoff.

title: Trump's Paxton endorsement in Texas runoff may haunt him
shortDescription: President Donald Trump abandoning Sen. John Cornyn destabilizes the White House's already-rocky relationship with Senate Republicans.
